description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular mailbox mounted on a sturdy, single wooden post. The mailbox body is primarily olive green with a white front and rear panel, and it features a heart-shaped cutout on the front door. A red mail flag is attached to the right side, indicating when mail is present. The mailbox has a curved, barrel-like top and a mail slot located centrally on the front face above the heart cutout. The post is robust and square, providing stable support, and there are no visible identification markings or numbers. The overall design is simple yet charming, suitable for suburban or residential urban environments.
description: A green and white mailbox with a heart-shaped cutout on the front, mounted on a single wooden post and featuring a red mail flag.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white door with a heart-shaped cutout and the central mail slot.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the olive green body, red mail flag, and the wooden post.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain white back panel and the supporting post.
description_view_3: Left side view highlighting the green body and the wooden post, with the flag barely visible.
